positive: A mystical nocturnal forest scene featuring glowing bioluminescent flora and fauna. The central subject is a majestic, stylized silhouette of a wolf howling at a crescent moon. The style is a combination of neo-tribal design, Art Nouveau curve lines, and intricate tattoo art. Use deep sapphire blue, emerald green, and ethereal gold accents. High contrast between the dark forest silhouette and the glowing foreground elements. Composition must be perfectly centered and circular for maximum apparel print impact. Crisp linework, vector illustration quality, perfect symmetry, designed for white t-shirt print. Clean edges, stylized, highly detailed, full moon glow.
negative: text, watermark, signature, logo, blurry, low resolution, artifact, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, photo, realistic, gradient, jpeg artifacts, messy background, cluttered, grainy
